ogTitle: Burrar Islet vs Burrum River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burrar Islet and Burrum River.
heading: Burrar Islet vs Burrum River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burrar Islet, Queensland and Burrum River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Burrum River (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burrar Islet or Burrum River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burrar Islet has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Burrum River scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burrar Islet scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Burrum River scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burrar Islet or Burrum River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
